scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix service-registry && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/climate-service && npm install --prefix services/government-service && npm install --prefix services/market-service && npm install --prefix services/recommendation-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "REGISTRY,GATEWAY,AUTH,CLIMATE,GOV,MARKET,REC,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan,yellow,blue,green,red,white,gray" "npm run start:registry" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:climate" "npm run start:gov" "npm run start:market" "npm run start:rec" "npm run start:frontend"
